Instructions: Format: {Article Title} | Book The Guide Blog

Instructions: Summarize the article in 1-2 sentences. Include primary keyword.

Instructions: Primary keyword + related terms + long-tail keywords
Example: Uttarakhand treks, best treks Uttarakhand, trekking in Uttarakhand 2026, Kedarnath trek

Instructions: Compelling, keyword-rich headline. Numbers work well.
Descriptive alt text for accessibility & SEO

Instructions: Auto-generated from H2 headings. Helps with Featured Snippets.

Instructions: Each main section should have keyword-rich H2. Use 5-10 H2s per article.
Sub-sections under H2. Use when breaking down a topic further.
Example: Difficulty Level, Best Time to Go, Cost Breakdown

Instructions: Well-structured paragraphs. Short sentences. Include keywords naturally. First paragraph should answer the main query.

Instructions: Use for tips, checklists, comparisons. Helps with Featured Snippets.
